creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lth
Date: Thu Mar  6 09:33:34 2014
New Revision: 347176
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/347176
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r347176/

Log:
  - Update to 1.44.14
  - Add LICENSE
  
  Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Parse-CPAN-Meta
  
  PR:		ports/187305
  Submitted by:	sunpoet@

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Parse-CPAN-Meta/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-Parse-CPAN-Meta/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/p5-Parse-CPAN-Meta/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Parse-CPAN-Meta/Makefile	Thu Mar  6 09:13:25 2014	(r347175)
+++ head/devel/p5-Parse-CPAN-Meta/Makefile	Thu Mar  6 09:33:34 2014	(r347176)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Parse-CPAN-Meta
-PORTVERSION=	1.44.04
+PORTVERSION=	1.44.14
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:DAGOLDEN
@@ -12,8 +12,11 @@ DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION:R}${
 MAINTAINER=	lth@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Parse META.yml and other similar CPAN metadata files
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-CPAN-Meta-YAML>=0.008:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-CPAN-Meta-YAML
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-CPAN-Meta-YAML>=0.008:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-CPAN-Meta-YAML
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-CPAN-Meta-YAML>=0.011:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-CPAN-Meta-YAML
+RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-CPAN-Meta-YAML>=0.011:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-CPAN-Meta-YAML
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure

Modified: head/devel/p5-Parse-CPAN-Meta/distinfo
==============================================================================
